apps.name: AYS2
apps.subtitle: PlayStation 2 emulator for iPhone & iPad
apps.localizedDescription:
AYS2 brings PlayStation 2 emulation to iOS with full JIT compilation, Flight Recorder diagnostics, and comprehensive game database support.

🎮 Features:
• Full-speed JIT (arm64) with MTVU support
• Comprehensive PS2 game library (12,800+ games)
• Per-game graphics optimization profiles
• Cheats & patches system
• Save states & memory cards
• AltStore/SideStore source support
• Flight Recorder performance monitoring

📋 Requirements:
• iOS 17.0+
• 1GB+ available storage per game
• Your own PS2 BIOS file
• JIT enabler (e.g., StikDebug)

AYS2 is free, open-source (GPL-3.0), and focused on accuracy and performance. Each update brings core improvements and stability fixes.

See "What's New" for the latest changes and improvements.

versions.localizedDescription:
What's new in v2.4.1-build.203:
• test: disable autoFlush for God of War II to isolate GPU-CPU sync bottleneck on iOS Metal
• fix: commit updated source.json back to repository after build
• fix: Revert ZIP support due to iOS compilation limitations
• fix: Remove unused Compression import and improve ZIP extraction reliability
• fix: Align IPA bundle version with source.json version to fix SideStore installation
• feat: Add ZIP file support with automatic extraction and game import
• feat: add interactive 3D perspective effect to game cover art
• feat: improve SideStore presentation with detailed description and 2.4.1 version
